messages.content:
You are a governance and resource derivation agent. Given a frozen Stage 1 decomposition and frozen Stage 2 interfaces, your task is to derive resource allocation and governance fields for each child.

RULES:
1. You MUST NOT change Stage 1 semantics (purpose, behavior, boundary, preconditions, postconditions, guarantees, composition_role) or Stage 2 signatures (inputs, outputs, signature).
2. You MUST NOT add, delete, rename, or reorder children.
3. Derive ONLY: global_vars, data_operations, requested_capabilities, constraints, acceptance_criteria, traceability, node_type.
4. Each child's global_vars MUST be a subset of the parent's global_vars.
5. The union of all children's data_operations must cover the parent's data needs.

OUTPUT FORMAT — Return valid JSON:
{
  "children": [
    {
      "name": "ChildName (UNCHANGED)",
      "purpose": "(UNCHANGED from Stage 1)",
      "behavior": "(UNCHANGED from Stage 1)",
      "boundary": {"in_scope": ["(UNCHANGED)"], "out_of_scope": ["(UNCHANGED)"]},
      "preconditions": ["(UNCHANGED)"],
      "postconditions": ["(UNCHANGED)"],
      "guarantees": ["(UNCHANGED)"],
      "composition_role": "(UNCHANGED)",
      "inputs": ["(UNCHANGED from Stage 2)"],
      "outputs": ["(UNCHANGED from Stage 2)"],
      "signature": "(UNCHANGED from Stage 2)",
      "global_vars": [{"variable": "var_name", "op": "read|write|read_write", "description": "what operation"}],
      "data_operations": [{"source_name": "source", "operation_type": "read|write|read_write", "description": "what operation"}],
      "requested_capabilities": ["resource.operation"],
      "constraints": [{"constraint_id": "C-001", "description": "constraint description"}],
      "acceptance_criteria": [{"ac_id": "AC-001", "description": "criterion"}],
      "traceability": {"parent_requirement_ids": ["FR-001"]},
      "node_type": "pure_function|atomic_operation",
      "stop_decompose": false,
      "stop_reason": ""
    }
  ],
  "governance_notes": "any notes for validator/codegen"
}

Derive governance and resource fields for each child.

Parent: ChatApp
Purpose: Handle real-time messaging operations

Parent inputs: input: Any - JSON with command (send/history/create_channel/join)
Parent outputs: output: Any - JSON with success, data, message

Available Data Stores:
  - messages (memory, read_write)
  - channels (memory, read_write)

Children (frozen from Stage 1 + Stage 2):
  ParseCommand: Parse the incoming JSON input to extract the command type and parameters
    signature: def ParseCommand(input: dict) -> tuple[str, dict]
    inputs: [{"name": "input", "type": "dict", "description": "Raw JSON input from user containing command and parameters", "source": "parent input"}]
    outputs: [{"name": "command", "type": "str", "description": "Parsed command string (send/history/create_channel/join)", "consumer": "parent"}, {"name": "params", "type": "dict", "description": "Remaining param
  ValidateSendMessage: Validate send message request: check channel membership and message content
    signature: def ValidateSendMessage(params: dict, channels: dict) -> tuple[bool, str]
    inputs: [{"name": "params", "type": "dict", "description": "Contains channel_id, message, and user_id", "source": "parent input"}, {"name": "channels", "type": "dict", "description": "Channel data store for m
    outputs: [{"name": "validation_result", "type": "bool", "description": "Boolean indicating if send is allowed", "consumer": "parent"}, {"name": "error_message", "type": "str", "description": "Error description
  StoreMessage: Store a new message in the messages data store
    signature: def StoreMessage(params: dict, messages: list) -> dict
    inputs: [{"name": "params", "type": "dict", "description": "Contains channel_id, message, and user_id", "source": "parent input"}, {"name": "messages", "type": "list", "description": "Messages data store for 
    outputs: [{"name": "stored_message", "type": "dict", "description": "The stored message object with id and timestamp", "consumer": "parent"}]
  RetrieveHistory: Retrieve recent message history for a channel, limited to 100 messages
    signature: def RetrieveHistory(params: dict, messages: list) -> list
    inputs: [{"name": "params", "type": "dict", "description": "Contains channel_id", "source": "parent input"}, {"name": "messages", "type": "list", "description": "Messages data store for reading", "source": "i
    outputs: [{"name": "history", "type": "list", "description": "Array of up to 100 message objects", "consumer": "parent"}]
  CreateChannel: Create a new channel in the channels data store
    signature: def CreateChannel(params: dict, channels: dict) -> dict
    inputs: [{"name": "params", "type": "dict", "description": "Contains channel_name and creator_user_id", "source": "parent input"}, {"name": "channels", "type": "dict", "description": "Channels data store for 
    outputs: [{"name": "created_channel", "type": "dict", "description": "The new channel object with id and members", "consumer": "parent"}]
  JoinChannel: Add a user to an existing channel's member list
    signature: def JoinChannel(params: dict, channels: dict) -> bool
    inputs: [{"name": "params", "type": "dict", "description": "Contains channel_id and user_id", "source": "parent input"}, {"name": "channels", "type": "dict", "description": "Channels data store for reading an
    outputs: [{"name": "join_result", "type": "bool", "description": "Boolean indicating success", "consumer": "parent"}]
  FormatResponse: Format the final output JSON with success status, data, and message
    signature: def FormatResponse(success: bool, data: any, message: str) -> dict
    inputs: [{"name": "success", "type": "bool", "description": "Boolean indicating operation success", "source": "parent input"}, {"name": "data", "type": "any", "description": "Result data from command executio
    outputs: [{"name": "output", "type": "dict", "description": "Formatted JSON response with success, data, message fields", "consumer": "parent"}]

Return ONLY the JSON response.
